name: Lendmark Financial Services LLC
description_short: Lendmark Financial Services is a consumer finance company offering personal loans, auto loans, and debt consolidation with fixed rates and same-day funding at their Charlotte NC branch and nationwide locations.
description_long:
Lendmark Financial Services LLC is an established consumer finance company that operates multiple physical branches across the United States, including a location in Charlotte, NC at 3220 Wilkinson Blvd. The company acquired Century Finance customers, indicating a history of consolidation and market presence in the consumer lending space. They position themselves as a relationship-driven lender focused on personalized service and local community presence.

The company offers three primary loan products: personal loans for general expenses (weddings, vacations, etc.), auto loans for new or used vehicle purchases and refinancing, and debt consolidation loans designed to simplify multiple payments into a single fixed-rate obligation. All loans feature fixed interest rates and scheduled payment plans. They emphasize flexibility in payment options and advertise same-day funding capability. Customers can apply online or in-branch, with approval decisions provided after document verification.

Lendmark differentiates itself through claims of personalized service, local branch availability, and quick approval processes with instant funding. They position loan experts as understanding customer needs and offering reliable, consistent financial services. The application process is described as simple, with options to apply online or in-person at physical locations. They also offer retail merchant sales finance services and credit insurance products.

The company operates traditional brick-and-mortar branches with established business hours (Mon-Fri 8:30am-5:30pm, closed weekends). While they advertise competitive fixed rates and same-day funding, the website provides no specific APR ranges, loan amounts, eligibility requirements, or terms. No information is disclosed about credit score requirements, debt-to-income ratios, or actual approval rates. The company uses third-party payment processing (ACI Payments) for online transactions.
address: 2296 E Carson St, Long Beach, CA 90807

company_info.headquarters: 2296 E Carson St, Long Beach, CA 90807

pros: Same-day or quick funding advertised, enabling fast access to capital
Fixed interest rates with scheduled payments provide budget predictability
Physical branch locations with in-person loan experts available for personalized service
Multiple loan product offerings (personal, auto, debt consolidation) under one company
Online application option available alongside in-branch applications
Debt consolidation specifically designed to reduce multiple payments to single payment
Flexible payment options available to accommodate different financial situations
cons: Website discloses no specific APR ranges, making cost comparison impossible
No eligibility criteria, minimum loan amounts, or credit score requirements stated
Limited branch availability—only one Charlotte location detailed; no full branch locator information provided
No customer reviews, ratings, or performance data disclosed on website
Uses third-party payment processor (ACI Payments), adding complexity to online payments
best_for: Borrowers seeking quick funding with fixed rates and predictable payments for personal expenses
Consumers with multiple high-interest debts wanting to consolidate into a single manageable payment
Vehicle buyers who prefer working with local branch staff and want same-day loan decisions
diagnosis: Lendmark is best suited for borrowers in Charlotte, NC (or other branch locations) who prioritize personalized in-person service, need quick funding decisions, and want fixed-rate loans with predictable payments. The primary caveat is the complete lack of transparent APR, rate, and eligibility information on the website—interested applicants cannot evaluate actual loan costs before visiting a branch or applying online, making it impossible to comparison shop on pricing.
services: Online payment processing via ACI Payments
